author: bohdansolovie
title: Coverage + recall miner (full small-project audit)
notes: Beats the king on project-PASS then TPs: exhaustive per-file deep coverage on small projects for 100% detection, reasoning_effort=medium enumeration on large ones, four timed passes (triage/deep/sweep/gap-fill) plus structural probes, strict JSON always closed to keep invalid runs at zero. sn60__bitsec/miner, sealed Chutes DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE.
